title: Non-record: JEPA-LM — When Synthetic Success Doesn't Transfer to Real…
author: himanshudongre

data.description: Adds a predictor head to map online encoder representations to predicted next-token representations for JEPA auxiliary loss.
Uses an exponential-moving-average target encoder during training to provide representation targets; discarded at export.

novel_contributions: Implements JEPA as a training-time auxiliary loss for language modeling
Shows strong synthetic Markov-chain gains that do not transfer to real English text
Demonstrates that JEPA's overhead outweighs its tiny real-text improvement at Parameter Golf scale
Provides a negative-result validation lesson: synthetic benchmarks can be misleading for language modeling
Checks off JEPA from the Requests for PRs wishlist
